case_title: DALE EDWARD MAYFIELD VS. MICHAEL A. KOBELT

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $433.49 FILED BY MAYFIELD, DALE EDWARD AS TO DEFENDANT KOBELT, MICHAEL A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-17-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO FEE. SERVED NOV-16-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KOBELT, MICHAEL A.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-17-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-17-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-17-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAYFIELD, DALE EDWARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KOBELT, MICHAEL A. $433.49 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $433.49 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $4.80 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT KOBELT, MICHAEL A.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAYFIELD, DALE EDWARD AS TO DEFENDANT KOBELT, MICHAEL A.
NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO AND HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION AS TO DEFENDANT KOBELT, MICHAEL A. HEARING SET FOR APR-04-2013 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE / CLAIM OF EXEMPTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAYFIELD, DALE EDWARD
CLAIM OF EXEMPTION PACKET - RECEIVED & FILED FROM SHERIFF.
THE CLAIM OF EXEMPTION SET FOR APR-04-2013 IS GRANTED.APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER "THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED.""THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE ANY EARNINGS HELD TO THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR."PER JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL.

SUBPOENA ISSUED TO MICHAEL A. KOBELT - 88 6TH ST.#418;SF,CA.94103 (415) 410-8819
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT KOBELT, MICHAEL A. HEARING SET FOR JUN-20-2013 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBPOENA RETURNED AND FILED PROOF WITHOUT ORGINAL SEAL SUBMITTED
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: MAY-23-2013 AS TO DEFENDANT KOBELT, MICHAEL A.

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUN-20-2013 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-08-2013 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. "JUDGMENT DEBTOR AGREES TO PAY JUDGMENT CREDITOR $2.00 MONTHLY STARTING TODAY. JUDGMENT DEBTOR IS SSI & RECEIVES ABOUT $881.00 MONTH AND CLAIMS HE CAN'T PAY MORE", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF AUG-08-2013 IS CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-19-2013 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF MUST SHOW UP AT THE NEXT HEARING AND INFORM THE COURT REGARDING STATUS OF THIS CASE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF SEP-19-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR -CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE, PER PROGRESS REPORT OF 8/8/13. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
